channel.title: Electronic Arts, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Electronic Arts, Inc. (ea).

item.title: CVE-2020-27708
item.description: A vulnerability exists in the Origin Client that could allow a non-Administrative user to elevate their access to either Administrator or System. Once the user has obtained elevated access, they may be able to take control of the system and perform a…
